US_SOCIAL_SECURITY_NUMBER.logic: Look for 9-digit patterns, often formatted as XXX-XX-XXXX. High risk of identity theft.

DATE_OF_BIRTH.description: Specific birth dates associated with individuals.
DATE_OF_BIRTH.logic: Identify dates linked to 'born', 'naci', 'dob' or in patient/client profiles.

NAME.logic: Full names or specific identifiers like 'User: [Name]'. Sensitive in clinical or financial contexts.

EMAIL.logic: Search for standard user@domain.tld patterns. Primary vector for phishing.

PHONE.logic: Detect international or local digits linked to contact info.

CREDIT_DEBIT_CARD_NUMBER.logic: 13 to 19-digit sequences. Often follows the Luhn algorithm pattern.

INTERNATIONAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.description: IBAN or domestic bank account numbers.
INTERNATIONAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.logic: Alphanumeric strings starting with ISO country codes (e.g., ES, DE, GB).

SWIFT_CODE.logic: 8 or 11 characters identifying specific financial institutions.

IP_ADDRESS.logic: Dot-decimal notation (v4) or colon-hexadecimal (v6). Internal infrastructure leak risk.

AWS_ACCESS_KEY.logic: 20-character uppercase alphanumeric strings starting with 'AKIA'. CRITICAL LEAK.

MEDICAL_RECORD_NUMBER.logic: Internal alphanumeric codes used in healthcare systems to track patients.

EQUIPMENT_ID.description: Unique identifier for physical gym assets and strength machinery.
EQUIPMENT_ID.logic: Detect strings following 'Equipment:', 'Machine:', or 'Asset:' followed by brand/model names (e.g., King Kong HI-POWER). This data identifies internal infrastructure and specific hardware location.

UNCATEGORIZED_SENSITIVE_DATA.description: Potential sensitive identifier or proprietary string not yet mapped in the registry.
UNCATEGORIZED_SENSITIVE_DATA.logic: Detect high-entropy strings, alphanumeric patterns (IDs), or data following labels like 'Secret:', 'Key:', 'Code:', or 'Internal:'.
